goal: Daily result showed lucky colours twice; show 3 round swatches on the chip; remove the Re-draw button everywhere
root_cause: Daily result rendered lucky colours in two places: the card-caption chip (buildLuckyColorChip — 1 swatch + single colour name) AND buildDailyAdvicePanel's 'Today's lucky colors' circle block. Re-draw button was only hidden on full mode.
fix: (1) buildLuckyColorChip now renders up to 3 round swatches (.spread-lucky-chip__dots) + a 'Lucky colors/สีมงคล' label, no single-colour text. (2) buildDailyAdvicePanel stripped of its lucky-colour block (ritual advice only; returns null if no ritual). (3) configureActionButtons: newReadingBtn.hidden = true for all modes. Added .spread-lucky-chip__dots CSS. Cache-bust ?v b→c.
verified: chrome MCP @390 reading result: caption chip shows 3 round dots; no 'Today's lucky colors' block (luckyChipCount=1); Re-draw button present in DOM but hidden on the result row.
notes: buildLuckyColorChip is shared → the 1-card quick-question result also gets the 3-dot chip (consistent, intended).

goal: Gift the Pawbit deck to a specific account without the streak unlock
fix: Added DECK_GIFTS = { 'krs.socialngame@gmail.com': ['pawbit'] } + isGiftedDeck(id) checking the signed-in user's email; canUnlockDeck short-circuits true for a gifted deck before the unlock_day check (Pawbit is normally streak-day-45).
verified: node --check OK; logic review. Not auto-testable (needs that account's Google login).
notes: data.js is an ES-module import (no ?v) → for a returning visitor the old data.js may be edge-cached; purge Cloudflare after deploy so the gift propagates immediately. Personal gift, not a purchasable entitlement.
